channel.title: App-Service on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in App-Service on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: Retirement: TLS 1.0 and TLS 1.1 in Azure App Service, Azure Functions, and Azure Logic Apps
item.description:
Azure App Service, Azure Functions, and Azure Logic Apps will stop accepting TLS 1.0 and TLS 1.1 connections after May 31, 2027. Clients and services must use TLS 1.2 or later to continue connecting.

  • Source: Azure Updates
